CREATE TABLE test_numbers (number Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY number;
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_numbers WHERE number > 5);
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) AS median_value, COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers GROUP BY (number > 5);
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM test_numbers UNION ALL SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM test_numbers WHERE number < 5;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers2 (value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM test_numbers JOIN test_numbers2 ON test_numbers.number < test_numbers2.value;
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_numbers) GROUP BY number;
SELECT quantileExactHigh(0.5)(number) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_numbers) WHERE number IN (SELECT value FROM test_numbers2 WHERE value > 12);
CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
CREATE TABLE test_datetimes (event_datetime DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_datetime;
